mapper.insert: INSERT INTO comment ( user_id, target_type, target_id, content, parent_id, status ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{targetType}, #{targetId}, #{content}, #{parentId}, 0 )
mapper.select: SELECT c.id, c.user_id as userId, c.target_type as targetType, c.target_id as targetId, c.content, c.parent_id as parentId, c.status, c.create_time as createTime, u.name as userName, u.avatar as userAvatar FROM comment c LEFT JOIN user u ON c.user_id = u.id WHERE c.target_type = #{targetType} AND c.target_id = #{targetId} AND c.status = 1 ORDER BY c.create_time ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO content_stats ( target_type, target_id, view_count, like_count, comment_count ) VALUES ( #{targetType}, #{targetId}, 0, 0, 1 )
